{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/137510281?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/baradika", "id": 137510281, "login": "baradika", "node_id": "U_kgDOCDI9iQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/baradika", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47745", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "## Impact

The admin tables for `PaymentMethods`, `Currencies` and `Carriers` exposed inline toggles and per-record actions (enable, disable, edit, delete) that were rendered for any authenticated panel user without checking the corresponding per-action permission. A low-privilege user could:

- Disable every payment method on the store, blocking checkout.
- Disable or alter the default currency, changing displayed prices and the exchange rate basis.
- Disable carriers, breaking shipping rate computation at checkout.

The impact is a full denial of checkout and pricing integrity loss, reachable by any authenticated user.

## Patches

Fixed in `v2.8.0`. Each toggle and per-record action now requires its matching permission (`edit_payment_methods`, `edit_currencies`, `edit_carriers`).

Upgrade via:

```bash
composer require shopper/admin:^2.8
```

## Workarounds

None. Upgrade to `v2.8.0`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00221, "percentile": 0.12508}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fxqw-97cc-7g5c", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T20:34:31Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fxqw-97cc-7g5c", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fxqw-97cc-7g5c"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47745"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-29T19:16:26Z", "published_at": "2026-06-05T20:34:31Z", "references": ["https://github.com/shopperlabs/shopper/security/advisories/GHSA-fxqw-97cc-7g5c", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-47745", "https://github.com/shopperlabs/shopper/pull/511", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fxqw-97cc-7g5c"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/shopperlabs/shopper/security-advisories/GHSA-fxqw-97cc-7g5c", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/shopperlabs/shopper", "summary": "Shopper: Missing per-action authorization on PaymentMethods, Currencies and Carriers admin tables", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T20:34:34Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fxqw-97cc-7g5c", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.8.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "shopper/framework"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Shopper: Missing per-action authorization on PaymentMethods, Currencies and Carriers admin tables
